# JARVIS Voice Assistant

> Browser voice assistant portfolio project with WebRTC realtime mode, STT/LLM/TTS pipeline, VAD, web search, and cost tracking.

## Core Context

- [README](README.md): product overview, quickstart, stack, review guide.
- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md): system design, data flow, and tradeoffs.
- [API](docs/api.md): local routes and request/response contracts.
- [Security](docs/security.md): security boundary, controls, and known limitations.
- [Publication](docs/publication.md): clean public GitHub publishing checklist.
- [Agent Instructions](AGENTS.md): repository map and safe editing rules.

## Source Files

- [server.js](server.js): Express gateway and AI provider calls.
- [public/index.html](public/index.html): browser UI and voice interaction logic.
- [workspace/SOUL.md](workspace/SOUL.md): public voice assistant instructions.
